name: Petty Cash
description: Small on-hand cash for minor expenses

name: Other Assets
description: Security deposits and other long-term assets

name: Accounts Payable
description: Amounts owed to vendors and suppliers

name: Accrued Liabilities
description: Expenses incurred but not yet paid

name: Wages Payable
description: Employee wages earned but not yet paid

name: Payroll Taxes Payable
description: Federal, state, and local payroll taxes owed

name: Sales Tax Payable
description: Collected sales tax owed to government

name: Long-Term Loans
description: Loans and notes payable due after one year

name: Unearned Revenue
description: Payments received for services not yet delivered

name: Retained Earnings
description: Accumulated net income retained in the business

name: Sales Revenue
description: Income from sale of goods or services

name: Shipping and Delivery
description: Costs to ship products to customers

name: Utilities
description: Electric, gas, water, and internet services

name: Bank Fees and Charges
description: Bank service charges and transaction fees

name: Interest Expense
description: Interest paid on loans and credit lines

name: Taxes and Licenses
description: Business licenses, permits, and non-income taxes
